subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou seest me abased before the threshold of Thy mercy, supplicating at the sanctuary of Thy oneness, imploring at [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ترانی یا الهی متذللا الی عتبه رحمانیتک متضرعا الی ساحه فردانیتک مبتهلا الی
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort
